_note: Config -> break -> diagnose -> fix. The broken step applies a Deployment whose envFrom names a missing ConfigMap (CreateContainerConfigError); verify-not-ready then confirms the fault is live, verify-root-cause confirms the signal is visible, and verify-recovered confirms the fix.

steps.run: envsubst < deployment-configured.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc set env deploy/hello-dcs --from=secret/hello-dcs-secret && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
sed -i 's/Configured by a ConfigMap/Reconfigured without a redeploy/' configmap.yaml && oc apply -f configmap.yaml
oc rollout restart deploy/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
envsubst < broken-deployment.yaml | oc apply -f - && sleep 8 || true
envsubst < deployment-configured.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
